name: fast-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for USENIX FAST (the USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies): routing a storage paper among FAST and its siblings (OSDI/ATC/NSDI/EuroSys/HotStorage/MSST/ACM TOS), the two-deadline (Spring/Fall) HotCRP cycle with USENIX double-blind review, the one-shot-revision decision, storage-specific evaluation (workload traces, write amplification, endurance/wear, tail latency, crash consistency, real-device measurement), USENIX artifact badges (Available/Functional/Reproduced), and the free open-access camera-ready. Grounded in the FAST '26 and FAST '27 calls, the USENIX artifact policy, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
